mechanism: Azure Policy denies resource deployment outside the approved region. The assignment parameter comes from deployment().location, so it stays in sync with the GitHub variable automatically.
why: The pipeline's region constraint can be bypassed by portal or script. Policy enforces at the control plane. Sourcing from deployment().location avoids drift when the GitHub variable changes.

related.note: Policy enforces at control plane what the pipeline establishes.
Must use an Allowed-prefixed assignment for locations.

violations: Resource deployed to an unapproved region via portal or script.
Policy assignment with hardcoded region instead of deployment().location.
